---
title: "Contact"
---
::: {.page-nav}
[← Home](index.qmd){.nav-button}
[Projects](projects.qmd){.nav-button}
[CV](cv.qmd){.nav-button}
:::

::: {.contact-card}
## Get in Touch
The easiest way to contact me is by email, but I have also included my phone number for reference.



**Email:** [Nutchanon.chai@gmail.com](mailto:nutchanon.chai@gmail.com)<br>
**Alternate Email:** [golf@bu.edu](mailto:golf@bu.edu)<br>
**Phone:** +66 83-079-1107 *(Thailand number; email is preferred for faster contact)*<br>
**Location:** Boston, MA

[Email Me](mailto:nutchanon.chai@gmail.com){.button}
:::
